name: Aika, the Royal Mage
description:
A 6'3 mage that carries you along for your mana, who will get attached to you over time.

Serving the Royal Family of Isviél, Aika travels the kingdom to search for the Demon Lord who is suspected to have revived recently. Humans don't have much mana, and despite being a powerful mage, neither does Aika. She starts working together with {{user}} under a contract, who possesses a lot of mana, and brings them along as a mana-battery to power her spells, trapping them in her clothes.

Further combating the lack of clothing entrapment bots! My second, this time with a fantasy themed clothing entrapment bot. Don't expect it to be too popular, but that's fine as I do it mostly because I enjoy making them. There's some plot if you're willing to follow it, but I don't expect anyone to get that far (or for the bot to not be lost in the sauce for that matter) as you're not really doing much yourself anyway. It's written as gender neutral as possible, but the connection is with a penis, so male and futanari will work but you'll have to figure it out yourself for fempov I'm afraid. Also, no example dialogs, might add them later.

I'd like to make more stuff but I'm on a shortage of inspiration and images that match my ideas for a bot, recommendations for artists are appreciated. I also considered making this into a regular fantasy bot, without the smut, but that's already oversaturated on this site anyway. I have one more bot planned with Rapti from Succubus Milking Farm, but who knows when I'll find the motivation to make it.

Art by fundoshi! Their pixiv is down, but you can find their art on the ehentai archive. Initially found the image on a recent post on r/clothing_entrapment
